subcodes.first_line: God willing, may you at all times and seasons repose beneath the shelter of the All-Merciful and arise in service to the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در جمیع احیان و اوان در ظل رحمن مستریح باشید و بخدمت جمال قدم بین
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
